title: sarcostemma pyrotechnicum
intro: Sarcostemma pyrotechnicum, also known as the fire cracker vine or fire cracker plant, is a plant species native to India and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Sarcostemma pyrotechnicum is typically dried and processed into powders or extracts, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to other herbal remedies.
